parameters.query:
=SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.store_id, ci.sku,
  i.item_name AS original_name, ci.quantity, i.stock, i.unit,
  ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }} AND c.status = 'active';

SELECT promo_code, discount_type, discount_value, min_cart_value, description
FROM public.promotions
WHERE is_active = true AND promo_scope = 'order'
  AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from)
  AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until)
ORDER BY priority DESC, discount_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO public.pending_orders (order_id, chat_id, store_id, status, final_order_total, order_details_json, created_at, expires_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.order_id }}',
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.chat_id }},
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.store_id }},
  'awaiting_confirmation',
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.final_order_total }},
  '{{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb,
  NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status='awaiting_confirmation',
  final_order_total=EXCLUDED.final_order_total,
  order_details_json=EXCLUDED.order_details_json,
  expires_at=NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  updated_at=NOW();
SELECT store_id, store_name, upi_id, owner_whatsapp_number, enable_pricing FROM public.stores LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO customer_preferences (chat_id, browse_context, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}', 'awaiting_address', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET browse_context = 'awaiting_address', updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING chat_id, browse_context;

=SELECT c.cart_id, c.user_id, c.store_id, ci.sku,
  i.item_name AS original_name, ci.quantity, i.stock, i.unit,
  ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }} AND c.status = 'active';

SELECT promo_code, discount_type, discount_value, min_cart_value, description
FROM public.promotions
WHERE is_active = true AND promo_scope = 'order'
  AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from)
  AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until)
ORDER BY priority DESC, discount_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO public.pending_orders (order_id, chat_id, store_id, status, final_order_total, order_details_json, created_at, expires_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.order_id }}',
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.chat_id }},
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.store_id }},
  'awaiting_confirmation',
  {{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.final_order_total }},
  '{{ $('Prep Pending Order').first().json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb,
  NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status='awaiting_confirmation',
  final_order_total=EXCLUDED.final_order_total,
  order_details_json=EXCLUDED.order_details_json,
  expires_at=NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  updated_at=NOW();
SELECT store_id, store_name, upi_id, owner_whatsapp_number, enable_pricing FROM public.stores LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO customer_preferences (chat_id, browse_context, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}', 'awaiting_address', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET browse_context = 'awaiting_address', updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING chat_id, browse_context;
